nasb.text: For the cry of distress has gone around the territory of Moab, Its wail goes as far as Eglaim and its wailing even to Beer-elim.

esv.text: For a cry has gone around the land of Moab; her wailing reaches to Eglaim; her wailing reaches to Beer-elim.

cnv.text: 哀號的聲音傳遍了摩押四境， 哀聲直達以基蓮，又傳到比珥．以琳。

ccb.text: 摩押境内哀声四起， 号啕声传到以基莲， 传到比珥·以琳。

csbs.text: 啊！哀声环绕摩押的四境， 号啕声远至以基莲， 号啕声远至比珥-以琳！
